title: anisogonium lineolatum
intro: Anisogonium lineolatum, also known as the yellow-flowered Anisogonium or Yellow Anisogonium, is a plant species in the family Malpighiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial for treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. Anisogonium lineolatum can be prepared as a decoction or infused in water to make a tea, which can be used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
